rationale: Guidance specifies concrete multi-channel delivery (email, SMS, in-app push, webhook) with performance targets (email within 5 minutes for critical, SMS <30 seconds, webhook retries up to 5 times with exponential backoff 1s-30s). Acceptance criteria detail high-priority event handling, user preference respect (daily digest vs real-time, SMS for critical only), and in-app navigation (<2 seconds). Reliability targets specified (99.95% delivery success for critical, 7-day failed job retention). User control requirements include preference customization, frequency settings, and timezone-aware scheduling. Token reduction from replacing 'reliable', 'good notifications', 'improve experience' with specific delivery times, retry strategies, and preference controls.
